title: Disney Incredibles Family Superhero Collectible Lip Gloss Tin Set of 3
description:
Featuring the characters from your favorite Disney crime-fighting family, Violette, Frozone, Jack Jack, Elastigirl, Dash and Mr. Incredible, this lip gloss set with collectible tin carrier includes three character lip gloss flavors: Cotton Candy for Dash, Grape for Elastigirl and Bubble Gum for Mr. Incredible. The fun and collective carry tin fits all three of the lip gloss flavors, so you easily can pack them up with you for family trips or send them with your little ones to school. The tin is also multipurpose, as it can be used to travel or store other of your little ones' treasured or special goodies! All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed and 100% authentic for worldwide distribution.

Disney Incredibles Family Superhero Collectible Lip Gloss Tin Set of 3

Featuring the characters from your favorite Disney crime-fighting family, Violette, Frozone, Jack Jack, Elastigirl, Dash and Mr. Incredible, this lip gloss set with collectible tin carrier includes three character lip gloss flavors: Cotton Candy for Dash, Grape for Elastigirl and Bubble Gum for Mr. Incredible.

Key Features

  • SHIMMER AND SHINE This super cool unique lip gloss set makes lips sparkle and shine, while hydrating and protecting, plus it features everyone's favorite Disney crime-fighting family: The Incredibles!
  • COOL COLLECTIVE TRAVEL STORAGE TIN: The decorative tin and each of the lip glosses are decorated with different Disney The Incredibles characters like features Violet, Elastigirl, Dash and of course, Mr. Incredible! Kids will have a blast toting and showing their friends this colorful collection of lip gloss
  • PUCKER UP WITH YUMMY FLAVORS: Children will have a great time trying out all the amazing flavors and there is sure to be something for everyone! The flavors include: Bubble Gum, Grape and Cotton Candy Three Sparkly Flavors: Cotton Candy, Grape, and Bubble Gum
  • GREAT STOCKING STUFFER: Great as a party favor, gift, stocking stuffer, swag bag, conference bag, goodie bag, Easter basket filler, Christmas gift, convention swag bag item or holiday gift
  • AGES 3 AND UP: This kit of lip balms is recommended for children ages 3 and up.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: INCREDLGT
  • UPC: 060886793717
  • Color: Red

The fun and collective carry tin fits all three of the lip gloss flavors, so you easily can pack them up with you for family trips or send them with your little ones to school. The tin is also multipurpose, as it can be used to travel or store other of your little ones' treasured or special goodies!

All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed and 100% authentic for worldwide distribution.
